description: Disease-specific question priorities for targeted diagnosis. Each disease has 5 priority questions ordered by diagnostic value.

Coffee Leaf Rust.priority_1: Do you see orange or yellow powder on the undersurface of the leaves?
Coffee Leaf Rust.priority_2: Are the affected spots circular with distinct yellow halos around them?
Coffee Leaf Rust.priority_3: Did this start on the older, lower leaves first?
Coffee Leaf Rust.priority_4: Can you see the powder easily wiping off if you touch it?
Coffee Leaf Rust.priority_5: Are the affected leaves falling off prematurely?

Red Spider Mites.priority_1: Do you see tiny mites or fine webbing under the leaves?
Red Spider Mites.priority_2: Are the leaves looking bronzed, dusty, or dull rather than shiny?
Red Spider Mites.priority_3: Is there fine yellow or white stippling (tiny dots) on the leaf surface?
Red Spider Mites.priority_4: Do the leaves feel dry or papery to the touch?
Red Spider Mites.priority_5: Are the symptoms worse during hot, dry weather?

Brown Eye Spot.priority_1: Do the spots have a dark brown center with a gray ring around it?
Brown Eye Spot.priority_2: Are the spots roughly circular with a distinct border?
Brown Eye Spot.priority_3: Can you see a small dark dot (pycnidium) in the center of each spot?
Brown Eye Spot.priority_4: Are the spots appearing mainly on older leaves?
Brown Eye Spot.priority_5: Did the spots start as small, dark marks before enlarging?

Coffee Phoma Leaf Spot.priority_1: Do the spots look angular or irregular rather than perfectly round?
Coffee Phoma Leaf Spot.priority_2: Are there small black dots (pycnidia) visible in the center of the spots?
Coffee Phoma Leaf Spot.priority_3: Is there a reddish or purplish halo around the affected areas?
Coffee Phoma Leaf Spot.priority_4: Are the affected areas sunken into the leaf surface?
Coffee Phoma Leaf Spot.priority_5: Did the symptoms develop during or after periods of high moisture?

Cercospora Leaf Spot.priority_1: Do the spots have a reddish-brown or rust-colored appearance?
Cercospora Leaf Spot.priority_2: Are the spots more circular compared to other leaf spot diseases?
Cercospora Leaf Spot.priority_3: Is there a distinctive yellow halo surrounding each spot?
Cercospora Leaf Spot.priority_4: Can you see small dark fruiting bodies (acervuli) on the spots?
Cercospora Leaf Spot.priority_5: Are the symptoms more pronounced on shaded lower leaves?

Anthracnose.priority_1: Do you see sunken, dark lesions on the stems or twigs?
Anthracnose.priority_2: Are the lesions appearing as crescent-shaped or elongated marks?
Anthracnose.priority_3: Are there dark, tarry-looking cankers on the branches?
Anthracnose.priority_4: Is the affected plant material starting to wilt or die back?
Anthracnose.priority_5: Did the symptoms start from the branch tips and progress downward?

Root Rot / Wilt Disease.priority_1: Is the plant wilting even when the soil is moist?
Root Rot / Wilt Disease.priority_2: Are the wilting symptoms appearing suddenly rather than gradually?
Root Rot / Wilt Disease.priority_3: Do the roots look soft, mushy, or have a foul odor?
Root Rot / Wilt Disease.priority_4: Is the base of the plant soft or showing dark discoloration?
Root Rot / Wilt Disease.priority_5: Is the wilting affecting the entire plant or just some branches?

Nitrogen Deficiency.priority_1: Are the older leaves yellowing while the veins remain slightly green?
Nitrogen Deficiency.priority_2: Is the yellowing starting from the tip and spreading toward the base of older leaves?
Nitrogen Deficiency.priority_3: Are the newer leaves at the top still appearing green and healthy?
Nitrogen Deficiency.priority_4: Is the yellowing affecting the entire leaf or just the areas between veins?
Nitrogen Deficiency.priority_5: Did the plant look normal until recently when symptoms developed?

Iron Deficiency.priority_1: Are the newer leaves at the top showing yellowing first?
Iron Deficiency.priority_2: Do the affected leaves show yellow color but keep green veins?
Iron Deficiency.priority_3: Is the green vein pattern prominent against the yellow tissue?
Iron Deficiency.priority_4: Are the oldest leaves at the bottom still mostly green?
Iron Deficiency.priority_5: Are the younger growth shoots showing more severe symptoms?

Potassium Deficiency.priority_1: Do the leaf edges appear scorched or burned-looking?
Potassium Deficiency.priority_2: Are the affected areas brown or reddish rather than yellow?
Potassium Deficiency.priority_3: Is the scorching starting from the leaf margins and spreading inward?
Potassium Deficiency.priority_4: Are the older leaves showing more severe edge symptoms?
Potassium Deficiency.priority_5: Do the affected leaves feel brittle or dry?

Magnesium Deficiency.priority_1: Do you see yellowing between the veins (interveinal chlorosis)?
Magnesium Deficiency.priority_2: Are the veins remaining distinctly green while tissue between them yellows?
Magnesium Deficiency.priority_3: Is this pattern appearing on older leaves while newer growth looks normal?
Magnesium Deficiency.priority_4: Does the condition progress from lower to upper leaves?
Magnesium Deficiency.priority_5: Are multiple leaves showing this vein-pattern yellowing?

Boron Deficiency.priority_1: Is the new growth at the top of the plant looking deformed or twisted?
Boron Deficiency.priority_2: Are the youngest leaves appearing stunted or misshapen?
Boron Deficiency.priority_3: Is the stem or petiole (leaf stalk) showing cracks or splits?
Boron Deficiency.priority_4: Are the terminal buds (growing tips) appearing unhealthy or dying?
Boron Deficiency.priority_5: Does the plant show poor overall growth despite adequate water and nutrients?

Zinc Deficiency.priority_1: Are the new leaves appearing smaller and more spaced out on the stem?
Zinc Deficiency.priority_2: Do the younger leaves show mottling or asymmetrical growth?
Zinc Deficiency.priority_3: Is the leaf pattern showing as alternating small and normal-sized leaves?
Zinc Deficiency.priority_4: Are the interveins showing yellowing on new leaves?
Zinc Deficiency.priority_5: Does the plant show stunted, bushy growth with shortened internodes?

Bacterial Canker.priority_1: Do you see raised, corky lesions or cankers on the branches?
Bacterial Canker.priority_2: Is there a gummy or sticky exudate oozing from the affected areas?
Bacterial Canker.priority_3: Are the cankers roughly oval or elongated in shape?
Bacterial Canker.priority_4: Is the bark appearing cracked or splitting around the lesions?
Bacterial Canker.priority_5: Are the branches above the canker starting to wilt or die back?

Coffee Berry Borer.priority_1: Do you see small round holes in the berries (cherelles)?
Coffee Berry Borer.priority_2: Is there visible damage extending into the berry interior?
Coffee Berry Borer.priority_3: Are the damaged berries appearing soft or with dark discoloration?
Coffee Berry Borer.priority_4: Can you see the pest or tunneling inside the berry?
Coffee Berry Borer.priority_5: Are multiple berries on the plant showing similar exit holes?

Leaf Miner Damage.priority_1: Do you see whitish, winding tunnels or trails within the leaves?
Leaf Miner Damage.priority_2: Are the affected leaves showing blotchy, irregular patterns?
Leaf Miner Damage.priority_3: Can you see the affected areas as transparent or bleached sections?
Leaf Miner Damage.priority_4: Are the damaged leaves still attached or starting to drop?
Leaf Miner Damage.priority_5: Are the mine patterns more prominent on younger, newer leaves?
